title: GB's Dumb Additions
description: This Mod Adds Random Stuff To The Game Suggested By Gamer Ben's Subscribers.
body:
# GB's Dumb Additions
**Based on Your Ideas!**

Check out the video [Here](https://youtu.be/RfeMxnGDIOo?si=ZKg0KucSjsrrO4e2).

This mod includes lots and lots of new features based on comments from YouTube!

This mod was inspired by Knarfy's "Breaking Minecraft With Your Dumb Ideas" series, and Mysticat's "Coding Your Dumb Ideas Into Minecraft" videos.

## Features

ZEUSY1.0 - Neutral mob

BasketBall - Neutral mob

Caseoh - Neutral Mob

Itachi - Neutral Mob

Pizza - Food

Everything You Touch Turns To Grass - Toggle In YDIConfig In The Configs Folder Of Your Instance

**{Contains Bug #681}** "Car" (Skateboard) - Rideable Passive Mob (Please Refer To The Known Bugs Section At The End Of The Page)

## BTW...
if the video hits 70 likes I will do another one!!!

## Known Bugs
- **#681** The Car/Skateboard Cannot Go Up Blocks When Being Ridden. Lead Use Is Recommended.


Enjoy!
